title: $paintedocc
text: $paintedocc Return the number of occurrences the specified entity drawn (painted) on the foForm or Report. $paintedocc { ( Entity ) } Example: $paintedocc (CUSTOMER) Parameters Table 1. Parameters Parameter Data Type Description Entity String Entity name. If omitted, the current entity is used. Return Values Table 2. Values returned in $paintedocc Value Meaning "" Entity does not exist or is not painted on the component >0 Number of occurrences painted for the specified entity. Use Use in Form and Report components. Example: Using $paintedocc This example shows a form on which occurrences of entity CUSTOMER have been drawn in three rows and two columns. In this case, $paintedocc(CUSTOMER) returns 6, the total number of occurrences. Figure 1. Multiple Occurrences Painted on a Form Related Links print Activate printing. Printing Character Sets To print, choose the device translation table that is specific for the character set. $printing Return a status indicating whether the current component is printing.
